title: Pin model and sampling parameters
description: Model id, version, and sampling parameters are explicit and pinned so behavior is reproducible and changes are reviewable.
body: Use when configuring which model and parameters a call uses. Do not rely on a provider's default or floating alias for production paths, and avoid silently changing temperature or max-tokens. Actions: pin an explicit model id/version; set temperature, top-p, and max-tokens deliberately; record the exact configuration with each stored response for replay. Validation signals include a test that the configured model/params are sent and a diff check that flags model-version changes for review. Risk boundary: an unpinned model upgrade can silently change output distribution; route such changes through evaluation before rollout.
